project_context: PII redaction wrapper postprocess; table is intended as a source-of-truth for context-triggered fallback rules and synthetic data generation.

official_format_notes.USI: Alphanumeric education identifier; can be all letters but not all numbers.

pattern_definitions.CITIZENSHIP_TEXT: (?im)\bcitizenship\s+status\s*[:#=\-]?\s*(?P<value>(?:Australian citizen|Permanent Resident|Temporary visa holder|New Zealand citizen|PR))

conflict_resolution: Exact context-triggered rule span beats lower-confidence model span at the same offset.
If two labels share the same numeric span, choose the label whose positive trigger is closest to the span.
Negative trigger within window suppresses AUTO_REDACT and either drops the span or demotes to REVIEW depending on policy.
Do not globally reinterpret 8-10 digit numbers: SID/UAC/account/licence all require label-specific context.
For expiry dates, prefer nearest entity context: card -> CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY, Medicare -> MEDICARE_EXPIRY, passport -> PASSPORT_EXPIRY.
